title: Skylines and domains
description: In this modpack you can find the mod called distant Horizons installed by default in Minecraft 1.21, No extra unessential mods are installed... I hope you enjoy it!
body:
# Distant Horizons on Fabric
This modpack exclusively features the Distant Horizons mod without any additional mods. The main focus is to provide a base experience, allowing users to gradually customize and enhance gameplay with their chosen mods.

Thanks to the Distant Horizons team for creating this revolutionary mod, Link to the distant horizons mod: [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LmE2bfjQOaQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
I hope you enjoy this pack that I created.
